title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.44 — GREEN CHASSIS REVERTED TO DARK (user on v0.4.43 full-screen: 'this looks like a 90s toy plugin now... we may have to paint it all and use layers of images'). DIAGNOSIS: the mockup showed small slices on a dark page, so the lit-lens tiles still glowed; full-screen on light enamel the backlighting DIES — a lamp only reads as light against darkness. Light ground + flat fills + no cast shadows/recesses + invisible grain at UI scale = toy. The dark chassis was the lamp-room. REVERTED: chassis gradient, enamel cards/borders, silkscreen titles, enamel blank plates — all back to the dark v0.4.42 state. KEPT: naval-teal power buttons (user liked them; they read on dark), all v0.4.42 patina, EC:: chassis palette constants (unused, retained for the photoreal work). DECIDED (interactive Qs): interim = dark; deep-dive target = FULL PHOTOREAL BY ANY MEANS (UAD/Softube territory — pre-rendered image layers/3D renders, procedural only for dynamic elements). Research workflow running: industry pipelines, JUCE raster best practices (filmstrips/retina/multi-scale), Blender-to-GUI pipeline, procedural-realism ceiling. NEXT: deep-dive report -> chosen pipeline -> photoreal rebuild bringing painted-metal back as image plates. OPEN: LIMITER rename.
